# AWS S3 Bucket

Title fixture: leading heading omits the required "<Kind>: " prefix. The title
rule must flag this with a prefix-mismatch result.

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "test_instance" "example" {
  name = "example"
}
```

## Argument Reference

* `name` - (Required) Name.

## Attribute Reference

This resource exports no additional attributes.
